name: folic acid
description: Folic acid is a synthetic form of vitamin B9 used in food fortification to support cell growth and red blood cell formation.
raw_text: marmite: Yeast extract (contains _barley_, _wheat_, _oats_, _rye_), salt, vegetable juice concentrate, vitamins (thiamin, riboflavin, niacin, vitamin B12, and folic acid), natural flavouring (contains _celery_). | Labels: en:vegetarian, en:vegan, en:green-dot, en:vegetarian-society, en:vegetarian-society-approved | Labels: en:no-colorings | Goody Cao: sugar, fat reduced cocoa powder 21%, dextrose, emulsifier (sunflower lecithins), vitamin c, vitamin e, niacin, pantothenic acid, thiamin, vitamin b6, folic acid, | Labels: en:vegetarian, en:no-gluten, en:vegan, en:rainforest-alliance, en:rainforest-alliance-cocoa
